title: 10 best herbal capsules for wheezing
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for wheezing are a natural remedy that helps alleviate symptoms associated with wheezing, a common condition characterized by a high-pitched whistling sound when breathing. These capsules are typically made from herbs such as Marshmallow root, Licorice root, and Thyme, which have anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. They help to reduce inflammation in the airways, making it easier to breathe and relieving wheezing symptoms. Examples of herbal capsules that help with wheezing include those containing Echinacea, Ginger, and Slippery Elm, which can significantly improve quality of life by allowing individuals to participate in daily activities without being hindered by respiratory issues.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Kansas coneflower capsules helps with wheezing because they contain a potent combination of antioxidants, flavonoids, and terpenes that work together to reduce inflammation in the airways. The anti-inflammatory properties help to relax bronchial tubes, making it easier for air to pass through and reducing the wheezing sound associated with asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD). Additionally, the herbal extract helps to soothe and calm the respiratory tract, providing relief from congestion and discomfort.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties: Echinacea contains compounds like cinnamic acid, which can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the body, potentially alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues.
Immune system support: Echinacea is known for its immunomodulatory effects, meaning it may help regulate the immune response to infections and reduce the severity of symptoms.
Mucilage content: Echinacea contains a type of soluble fiber called mucilage, which can help soothe irritated respiratory tissues and provide relief from coughing and wheezing.
remedy_constituents: Iridoid glycosides: These compounds have anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory properties, which may help reduce inflammation and swelling in the airways associated with wheezing.
Flavonoids (including rutin and kaempferol): As antioxidants, flavonoids can help protect the airway tissues from oxidative damage and inflammation, potentially alleviating wheezing symptoms.
Alkylamides: These compounds have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and bronchodilatory effects, which may help relax the airway muscles and improve breathing in individuals with wheezing.
remedy_parts: Roots: They are often used due to their purported anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting properties.
Leaves: They are used because of their potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues.
Barks: They are sometimes used for their possible antitussive (cough-suppressing) effects and anti-inflammatory properties.
remedy_recipe: Harvest a sufficient quantity of echinacea angustifolia roots approximately 2-3 pounds for drying.
Clean the harvested roots with a gentle stream of water to remove any dirt or debris.
Dry the cleaned roots in a single layer at 150-200 degrees fahrenheit for 2-3 hours.
Grind the dried echinacea angustifolia roots into a fine powder using a high-speed grinder.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 300-500 milligrams of the powdered echinacea angustifolia root material.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with wheezing because they contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that has anti-inflammatory properties. Wheezing is often caused by inflammation in the airways, and glycyrrhizin helps to reduce this inflammation, making it easier for people to breathe. Additionally, licorice root has been traditionally used to soothe respiratory issues and calm coughs, which can also help alleviate wheezing symptoms. By reducing inflammation and soothing the throat and airways, herbal licorice capsules can provide relief from wheezing and other respiratory problems.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: Helps to reduce inflammation and mucous production in the airways, which can exacerbate wheezing symptoms.
Flavonoids: Act as antioxidants and anti-inflammatory agents, reducing oxidative stress and calming bronchial spasms that contribute to wheezing.
Saponins: Have a expectorant effect, helping to loosen and clear mucus from the airways, making it easier to breathe and reducing wheezing episodes.
remedy_constituents: Licorice Flavonoids (Glycyrrhizin): These compounds help reduce inflammation and mucus production in the airways, alleviating wheezing symptoms.
Terpenoids (Glycyrrhizic acid): They possess anti-inflammatory and anti-allergic properties that help to relax the bronchial muscles and reduce wheezing.

Phenolic Compounds (Licoflavone C): These compounds exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities that help to protect the airways from oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to wheezing.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Glycyrrhiza glabra are commonly used due to their high content of glycyrrhizin, a compound that has anti-inflammatory properties and helps in soothing respiratory issues.
Leaves: The leaves of Glycyrrhiza glabra are also used, as they contain flavonoids and other compounds that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and bronchodilatory effects.
Stems: The stems of Glycyrrhiza glabra are occasionally used, as they contain similar compounds to the roots and leaves, which can help in reducing wheezing and other respiratory symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Dry the roots of glycyrrhiza glabra in a low temperature oven at 50 degrees celsius for 24 hours.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered glycyrrhiza glabra with a small amount of cornstarch to fill the capsules.
Use a capsule filling machine to fill the capsules with the mixture.
Label the capsules with the name and dosage of the product which is 400 milligrams per capsule.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Creeping thyme capsules helps with wheezing because of its natural ability to ease respiratory congestion. The herb contains compounds that help to relax bronchial muscles, reducing inflammation and opening up airways, making it easier to breathe. Additionally, the antioxidants present in creeping thyme capsules have anti-inflammatory properties that help to combat oxidative stress, which can contribute to wheezing and other respiratory issues. By addressing these underlying causes, creeping thyme capsules provide natural relief from wheezing symptoms.
remedy_properties: Expectorant properties: Herbal creeping thyme capsules can help loosen and clear mucus from the lungs, which can relieve wheezing caused by congestion or respiratory infections.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Thyme's anti-inflammatory compounds may help reduce swelling and irritation in the airways, which can contribute to wheezing in people with conditions like asthma or chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD).

Antimicrobial properties: Thyme's antimicrobial agents may help combat bacterial or viral infections that can cause wheezing, such as bronchitis or pneumonia, by inhibiting the growth of pathogens and promoting healing.
remedy_constituents: Rosmarinic acid: This phenolic compound has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation in the airways and alleviate wheezing symptoms.
Bornyl acetate: This monoterpene has expectorant properties, which can help loosen and clear mucus from the airways, making it easier to breathe and relieving wheezing.
Thymol: This phenolic compound has antimicrobial properties, which can help combat respiratory infections that can trigger wheezing, such as bronchitis or pneumonia.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 cup of fresh thymus serpyllum leaves and flowers in the early morning when the dew is still present.
Dry the harvested thymus serpyllum in a single layer at 30 degrees celsius for 2 hours.
Grind 250 grams of dried thymus serpyllum into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix 2 teaspoons of the thymus serpyllum powder with 5 grams of gelatin in a bowl.
Fill 10 empty gelatin capsules with the thymus serpyllum gelatin mixture and seal them tightly.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are used due to their high concentration of volatile oils, particularly thymol, which helps in reducing wheezing symptoms.
Flowers: They contain thymol and other compounds that help in relieving congestion and wheezing associated with respiratory issues.
Stems: The stems of Thymus serpyllum also contain thymol and other volatile oils, making them a useful part for making capsules to alleviate wheezing.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Frankincense capsules helps with wheezing because of their anti-inflammatory properties, which reduce swelling in the airways and alleviate respiratory congestion. The capsules' boswellic acids also help to relax the bronchial muscles, making it easier for air to pass through, thus relieving wheezing symptoms. Additionally, frankincense has natural expectorant properties that help to loosen mucus and promote its clearance from the lungs, further reducing wheezing episodes and improving respiratory health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Frankincense capsules contain boswellic acids, which have been shown to reduce inflammation in the airways, helping to alleviate symptoms of wheezing such as bronchial constriction and swelling.

Antioxidant property: The antioxidants present in frankincense capsules help protect the lungs from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to chronic respiratory conditions like wheezing.

Immune-modulating property: Frankincense has been found to modulate the immune system's response to inflammation, helping to reduce excessive mucus production and airway constriction, which are common symptoms of wheezing.
remedy_constituents: Terpenoids (specifically, boswellic acids): They help with wheezing by inhibiting the production of leukotrienes, which are chemical mediators that contribute to inflammation and airway constriction in conditions like asthma.

Acylphloroglucinols (specifically, 3-acetyl-11-keto-boswellic acid): They help with wheezing by reducing inflammation and suppressing the activity of inflammatory cells, such as eosinophils, which play a role in airway inflammation.

Triterpenoids (specifically, beta-boswellic acid): They help with wheezing by inhibiting the activity of enzymes involved in the production of pro-inflammatory eicosanoids, which contribute to airway constriction and inflammation.
remedy_parts: Roots: They contain boswellic acids, which are responsible for the anti-inflammatory and bronchodilatory effects that help alleviate wheezing.
Rhyzomes: They are a rich source of boswellic acids, which can help reduce inflammation and open up airways to relieve wheezing.
Seeds: They contain boswellic acids and other bioactive compounds that contribute to the anti-inflammatory and bronchodilatory properties of Boswellia serrata capsules for wheezing relief.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500 grams of dried boswellia serrata bark in a clean room environment to ensure purity.
Grind the boswellia serrata bark into fine powder using a high-speed grinder for 10 minutes.
Mix 250 grams of the powder with 250 grams of gelatin powder in a large bowl.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with the mixture using a capsule filler machine in about 30 minutes.
Label and store the herbal boswellia serrata capsules in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon verbena capsules helps with wheezing because its natural compounds, such as citral and limonene, have a soothing effect on the respiratory system. These bioactive agents relax the airway muscles, reducing inflammation and constriction that can cause wheezing and other breathing difficulties. The capsules also exhibit expectorant properties, helping to loosen and clear out mucus from the lungs, further alleviating wheezing symptoms. As a result, lemon verbena capsules provide natural relief for individuals suffering from wheezing and related respiratory issues.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Lemon verbena's antioxidants help neutralize free radicals in the body, which can contribute to inflammation and airway constriction, reducing wheezing symptoms.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The herbal extract has been shown to reduce inflammation in the airways, which can exacerbate wheezing and other respiratory issues, providing relief from congestion and discomfort.
Muscle relaxant properties: Lemon verbena's relaxing effects on smooth muscle tissue can help alleviate spasms in the bronchial tubes, reducing wheezing and making breathing easier.
remedy_constituents: Verbenalin: This iridoid glycoside acts as an antispasmodic, which helps relax the smooth muscles in the airways, reducing wheezing and coughing associated with respiratory issues.
Rutin: A flavonoid glycoside, rutin exhibits anti-inflammatory properties that may help reduce inflammation in the airways, alleviating wheezing and other respiratory symptoms.
Limonene: A terpene found in Verbena officinalis, limonene has been shown to have bronchodilatory effects, which means it helps widen the airways, making breathing easier and reducing wheezing.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Leaves are used to make capsules for wheezing because of their high content of flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties.
Roots: Roots are used to make capsules for wheezing because of their rich content of tannins and triterpenoids, which have expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects.
Flowers: Flowers are used to make capsules for wheezing because of their high content of essential oils, which have bronchodilatory and anti-inflammatory effects.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 200 grams of fresh verbena officinalis leaves and flowers when they are in full bloom and dry them completely for 24 hours.
Crush the dried plant material into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for about 30 minutes.
Mix the powder with 100 grams of gelatin capsules and 20 grams of silicon dioxide filler in a bowl.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the powder mixture using a powder filling machine or a manual capsule filler.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Elder capsules helps with wheezing because they contain the natural anti-inflammatory properties of elderberry, which can help to reduce inflammation in the respiratory tract. The anthocyanins and flavonoids present in elderberry have been shown to have a bronchodilatory effect, helping to relax and dilate airway passages, making it easier for air to flow through the lungs. Additionally, elder capsules may also help to reduce mucus production, further alleviating wheezing symptoms. As a result, taking elder capsules regularly can provide relief from wheezing and other respiratory issues.
remedy_properties: Quercetin: A flavonoid antioxidant that helps reduce inflammation and alleviate bronchospasm, leading to relief from wheezing.
Isorhapontigenin: A polyphenolic compound that has been shown to inhibit the contraction of airway smooth muscle, helping to relax the airways and reduce wheezing symptoms.
Rutin: A flavonoid that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce inflammation in the airways and alleviate symptoms such as wheezing.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These polyphenolic compounds help reduce inflammation in the airways, which can contribute to wheezing, and also exhibit antioxidant properties to protect the lungs from oxidative stress.

Sambunigrin (Sambutriol): This glycoside has antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which help relax the airway muscles and reduce inflammation, making it easier to breathe and alleviate wheezing symptoms.
Tannins: These polyphenolic compounds have astringent properties, which help reduce mucus production and secretion in the airways, making it easier to breathe and alleviate wheezing symptoms.
remedy_parts: Flowers: They contain antihistamines and anti-inflammatory compounds that help alleviate wheezing and respiratory issues.
Fruits: The berries are rich in antioxidants and anthocyanins, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe respiratory problems.
Leaves: They have expectorant properties that help loosen and clear mucus from the airways, making it easier to breathe.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 to 2 pounds of fresh sambucus nigra flowers and leaves in late summer or early fall.
Dry the plant material in a well-ventilated area at 50-60 degrees celsius for 2-3 hours to reduce moisture content.
Crush 100 grams of the dried sambucus nigra flowers and leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix the powdered sambucus nigra with 100 grams of gelatin and 50 grams of water to create a gel-like substance.
Fill gelatin capsules with the sambucus nigra mixture and store them in an airtight container for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with wheezing because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties. The herb contains isopimaric acid, a compound that has been shown to reduce inflammation in the airways, making it an effective natural remedy for alleviating wheezing symptoms. Additionally, dandelion root extract has been found to relax bronchial smooth muscle, reducing constriction and allowing for easier breathing. By addressing underlying inflammation and relaxing the airways, dandelion capsules can help relieve wheezing and provide natural respiratory support.
remedy_properties: Inflammation reduction: Dandelion's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as taraxasterol and sesquiterpenes, help reduce inflammation in the airways, which can contribute to wheezing symptoms.

Mucus thinning and clearing: The saponins present in dandelion capsules have been shown to help thin and clear out excess mucus from the lungs and airways, making it easier to breathe and reducing wheezing episodes.

Antioxidant activity: Dandelion's antioxidant compounds help protect the lungs and airways from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to chronic inflammation and wheezing.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These plant-based compounds help with wheezing by reducing inflammation and oxidative stress in the airways, making it easier to breathe.
Taraxasterol: This triterpenoid saponin helps with wheezing by exhibiting bronchodilatory effects, relaxing the airway muscles and improving lung function.
Taraxeryl acetate: This triterpene ester helps with wheezing by inhibiting the release of histamine and other pro-inflammatory mediators, thereby reducing inflammation and airway constriction.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are used due to their anti-inflammatory properties and ability to relieve respiratory issues.
Roots: They are used as they contain compounds that help reduce inflammation and alleviate wheezing symptoms.
Seeds: They are used due to their expectorant properties, which help to loosen and clear mucus from the respiratory tract.
remedy_recipe: Harvest taraxacum officinale roots and leaves from a clean and pesticide-free environment.
Dry the harvested roots and leaves in a low-temperature oven at 150 degrees fahrenheit for 2 hours.
Grind 1 gram of dried taraxacum officinale roots and 2 grams of dried taraxacum officinale leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix the powder with 2 grams of gelatin and 10 milliliters of distilled water to create a gelatinous mixture.
Fill gelatin capsules with the mixture and store them in an airtight container at room temperature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Hyssop capsules helps with wheezing because they contain a natural extract of Hyssopus officinalis, which has been traditionally used to soothe respiratory issues. The capsule's active ingredients, including flavonoids and saponins, have anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce bronchial constriction and mucous production, making it easier to breathe. As wheezing is often a symptom of bronchitis, asthma, or allergies, the capsules can provide relief from these conditions by calming irritated airways and promoting healthy lung function.
remedy_properties: Antispasmodic properties: Hyssop capsules help relax the airway muscles and reduce spasms, which alleviates wheezing by allowing for smoother breathing.
Expectorant properties: Hyssop's expectorant properties help loosen and clear mucus from the lungs, making it easier to breathe and reducing wheezing caused by congestion.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Hyssop's anti-inflammatory properties help reduce inflammation in the airways, which can contribute to wheezing, and also alleviate other respiratory symptoms such as coughing and chest tightness.
remedy_constituents: Rosmarinic acid: A phenolic compound that helps with wheezing by exerting anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, reducing inflammation in the airways and alleviating respiratory issues.
Urosolic acid: A triterpenoid that helps with wheezing by exhibiting bronchodilatory properties, relaxing airway muscles and making breathing easier for individuals with respiratory conditions.
Bornyl acetate: A terpene that helps with wheezing by possessing expectorant properties, helping to thin mucus and promote its expulsion from the airways, making it easier to breathe.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Leaves are often used due to their rich essential oil content, which contains compounds like borneol and camphor that help relax airway muscles.
Stems: Stems are used because they contain a significant amount of essential oils, including pinocamphone and anethole, which have expectorant properties that help relieve wheezing.
Buds: Buds are used due to their high concentration of essential oils, including camphor and borneol, which help to reduce inflammation and open airways.
remedy_recipe: Gather 250 grams of hyssopus officinalis flowers, dried to preserve their potency and aroma.
Grind the dried flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder, taking about 5 minutes.
Mix the powder with 25 grams of gelatin to create a uniform blend, using a spoon.
Fill 100 empty gelatin capsules with the hyssopus officinalis mixture, using a capsule filler, taking about 10 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight and moisture.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Kava capsules helps with wheezing because they contain a unique combination of compounds that have a calming effect on the airways, reducing inflammation and constriction. The kavalactones present in kava help to relax the smooth muscles surrounding the bronchioles, allowing for easier airflow and reduced wheezing. Additionally, kava's natural anti-inflammatory properties can help to reduce swelling in the lungs, further alleviating symptoms of wheezing. Overall, kava capsules offer a natural and effective way to find relief from wheezing episodes.
remedy_properties: Kavalactones: Kavalactones, the active compounds in kava, have been shown to reduce inflammation and bronchospasm, which can contribute to wheezing by relaxing airway muscles and improving airflow.

Antioxidant activity: Herbal kava capsules contain antioxidants that help protect the lungs from oxidative stress and damage caused by environmental pollutants, allergens, or other irritants that may exacerbate wheezing.

Anxiolytic effects: Kava has been traditionally used to treat anxiety and stress, which are common triggers for wheezing in some individuals. The anxiolytic properties of kava may help reduce wheezing episodes by reducing overall respiratory distress.
remedy_constituents: Kavain: A sesquiterpene lactone with sedative and anxiolytic properties, which may help reduce stress-induced wheezing.
Hinducin: A lignan with antioxidant properties, which could help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the airways.
Methysticin: A sesquiterpene lactone with bronchodilatory effects, which may help relax airway muscles and improve breathing.
remedy_parts: Roots: They are used to make capsules for wheezing due to their high content of kava lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and bronchodilatory properties.
Leaves: They are used to make capsules for wheezing due to their ability to relax muscles and reduce inflammation in the airways.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 10 grams of dried piper methysticum root from a trusted supplier or cultivated source.
Crush the dried root into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or coffee grinder.
Mix 0.5 grams of the powdered root with 1 gram of carrier material such as cornstarch in a bowl.
Fill gelatin capsules with the root-carrier mixture using an empty capsule filler and press the filler.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dry place for up to 6 months.

This natural agent helps to reduce inflammation in the airways, easing congestion and opening up the respiratory passages, allowing for easier breathing. remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Ceylon cinnamon's antioxidants help reduce oxidative stress in the lungs, which can contribute to wheezing by reducing inflammation and improving lung function.

remedy_parts: Leaves: Cinnamomum verum leaves are commonly used to make capsules for wheezing due to their expectorant properties, which help loosen and clear mucus from the airways.
Buds: Cinnamomum verum buds are used in capsules for wheezing because they possess anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce inflammation and congestion in the respiratory tract.
Barks: Cinnamomum verum bark is used to make capsules for wheezing as it contains oils with bronchodilatory properties, which help relax and widen the airways, making it easier to breathe.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 250g of cinnamomum verum bark dried to 10% moisture content for optimal potency.
Grind 150g of dried cinnamomum verum bark into fine powder using a coffee grinder for 5 minutes.
Mix 50g of starch as a filler with 150g of ground cinnamomum verum powder in a bowl.
Fill 120 empty gelatin capsules with 0.5g of powder mixture using a small spoon for 10 minutes.
Store the herbal cinnamomum verum capsules in a cool dark place for up to 24 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Fennel capsules helps with wheezing because they contain a natural compound called anethole, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory properties. remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can help soothe respiratory issues such as wheezing.
Barks: Contains flavonoids that have been shown to reduce inflammation and bronchospasm, making it effective in treating wheezing.
remedy_recipe: Measure one cup of dried foeniculum vulgare flowers and place them in a clean glass jar.
Add 3 cups of boiling water to the jar and let it steep for 30 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into another container.
Combine the strained liquid with enough glycerin to form a gel-like consistency then fill capsules.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months.

Barks: Containing flavonoids and saponins, barks have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, which can cause wheezing.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh rosa rugosa petals at dawn when they are fully open and fragrant.
Dry the petals in a single layer on paper bags or trays for 24 to 48 hours.
Crush dried rosa rugosa petals into fine powder using mortar and pestle or blender.
Mix 400mg of powdered rosa rugosa with 100mg of lactose filler and fill #00 capsules.
Store the filled capsules in airtight container at room temperature for up to six months.

Seeds: Containing sesquiterpenes, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and bronchodilatory properties, making them effective in alleviating wheezing symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality lavandula angustifolia flowers, ensuring a minimum of 100 grams for sufficient yield.
Dry the harvested flowers using air circulation and low heat for at least 24 hours.
Grind dried lavandula angustifolia flowers into fine powder, achieving a consistency of approximately 60 mesh.
Mix 1 part ground lavandula angustifolia with 3 parts cellulose or silica filler, resulting in a uniform blend.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the prepared blend, using approximately 0.25-0.30 grams per capsule.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chamomile capsules helps with wheezing because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties, which soothe and calm irritated airways. The herb's flavonoids and terpenoids work together to reduce inflammation, relax bronchial muscles, and increase the production of mucous, making it easier to expel. As a result, chamomile capsules can help alleviate wheezing symptoms by reducing congestion, clearing out excess mucus, and opening up airways, providing natural relief for respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Chamomile's anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce swelling and inflammation in the airways, which can alleviate wheezing and other symptoms of respiratory issues such as asthma.
Muscle relaxant property: Chamomile's natural muscle-relaxing properties can help ease spasms in the diaphragm and bronchial tubes, allowing for smoother breathing and reduced wheezing.

Antispasmodic property: Chamomile's antispasmodic compounds can help calm down abnormal contractions of the smooth muscles in the respiratory tract, which can contribute to wheezing and other breathing difficulties.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of chamomile contain apigenin, an antioxidant that helps to relax airway muscles and reduce inflammation in the lungs.
Flowers: Chamomile flowers are a rich source of azulene, a compound that has anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in soothing wheezing symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality dried chamomile flowers according to the recommended dosage of 500 milligrams per serving.
Grind the dried chamomile flowers into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for about 30 seconds.
Sift the ground chamomile powder through a mesh strainer to remove any lumps or large particles for 5 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the sifted chamomile powder, following the recommended dosage of 500 milligrams per capsule for 10 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool, dark place for up to six months before consumption or expiration date.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Stevia capsules helps with wheezing because they contain a natural sweetener that can help to calm and soothe the airways, reducing inflammation and constriction. The compounds in stevia have been shown to have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of bronchial asthma, including wheezing, coughing, and shortness of breath. By taking stevia capsules regularly, individuals may experience a reduction in the frequency and severity of their wheezing episodes, leading to improved respiratory health and overall well-being.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Herbal Stevia capsules contain compounds that reduce inflammation in the airways, which can help alleviate symptoms of wheezing caused by conditions like asthma or chronic bronchitis.
Expectorant properties: Stevia's natural expectorants help loosen and clear mucus from the respiratory tract, making it easier to breathe and reducing wheezing caused by excess mucus production.

Antispasmodic properties: Herbal Stevia capsules contain compounds that relax smooth muscle tissue in the airways, which can help relieve wheezing caused by spasms or constriction of the bronchial tubes.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, stevia roots are believed to help alleviate symptoms of bronchial congestion and wheezing by reducing inflammation in the airways.
Rhyzomes: Stevia rhyzomes contain bioactive compounds that have been shown to relax bronchial smooth muscle, helping to ease wheezing and breathing difficulties.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried stevia rebaudiana leaves in sufficient quantity for preparation of the extract.
Grind 20 grams of stevia rebaudiana leaves into fine powder using mortar and pestle.
Combine ground stevia powder with 50 milliliters of hot distilled water to create a decoction mixture.
Allow the decoction mixture to steep for 30 minutes before filtering it through cheesecloth.
Fill empty capsules with one-half teaspoon of filtered extract and seal immediately.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maypop capsules helps with wheezing because they contain a natural ingredient, Passiflora incarnata, which has been traditionally used to calm respiratory issues. The herbal extract in maypop capsules soothes and relaxes the airways, reducing inflammation and spasms that can cause wheezing. Additionally, it also has a bronchodilatory effect, allowing for easier breathing and clearing of mucus from the lungs. By using maypop capsules, individuals suffering from wheezing can experience relief from symptoms and enjoy improved lung function.
remedy_properties: Antispasmodic: Maypop capsules contain Passiflora incarnata, which has been shown to relax bronchial smooth muscle and reduce spasms, helping to alleviate wheezing and other respiratory symptoms.

Anti-inflammatory: The herbs in Maypop capsules have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce swelling and inflammation in the airways, making it easier to breathe and reducing wheezing episodes.
Antioxidant: The antioxidants present in Maypop capsules can help protect the lungs from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to respiratory issues like wheezing.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, making it effective in reducing inflammation and soothing respiratory issues.
Rhyzomes: Contain flavonoids and saponins that help to relax bronchial muscles and reduce constriction, alleviating symptoms of wheezing.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality dried passiflora incarnata leaves and flowers in quantities sufficient for processing.
Clean the dried herbs by sieving them through a fine-mesh sieve to remove any debris or impurities.
Grind the cleaned herbs into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Mix the ground herb powder with 500mg of gelatin capsules in a ratio of 1:1, filling each capsule by hand or using an encapsulating machine.
Label and store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months before use.

supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to wheezing that are treated with herbal capsules are bronchitis, asthma, and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD). Herbs such as ginger, turmeric, and licorice root help relieve respiratory congestion and inflammation. Capsules containing these herbs can soothe irritated airways, reduce coughing, and make breathing easier. Other herbal ingredients like echinacea and garlic are also used to boost immunity and fight off infections that may exacerbate wheezing symptoms.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal capsules that help with wheezing is a blend of Ashwagandha, Ginger, and Turmeric. Ashwagandha reduces inflammation and stress, while Ginger's expectorant properties help loosen mucus, and Turmeric's anti-inflammatory compounds ease congestion. This synergistic combination works to soothe and calm the airways, promoting easy breathing and alleviating wheezing symptoms. Some herbal supplements may also include Eleuthero and Licorice root to further support lung health and immune function, making it easier to breathe and feel more comfortable.
intro_study: For example, according to a study published by The Korean journal of internal medicine, herbal capsules containing a combination of seven medicinal plants, known as HL301, were found to be effective in treating wheezing associated with acute bronchitis. In a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial involving 166 patients, those who received HL301 (600 mg/day) for 7 days showed a greater improvement in bronchitis severity score (BSS) compared to the placebo group, with a mean change of 4.57 ± 1.82 in the HL301 group versus 3.15 ± 3.08 in the placebo group (p < 0.01). This suggests that herbal capsules like HL301 may be a viable option for alleviating wheezing symptoms in patients with acute bronchitis.
